examples.title: Uncontrolled disclosure
examples.description: Without bind:open the component owns its toggle state.
examples.code: Orders ship within two business days. Tracking is emailed on dispatch.

examples.title: Controlled with bind:open
examples.description: An external control drives open state via two-way binding.
examples.code: This panel's open state is shared with the external button above.

examples.title: State-aware trigger label
examples.description: A snippet trigger receives { open, disabled } so the label can react to state.
examples.code:
{#snippet trigger({ open })} {open ? 'Hide advanced options' : 'Show advanced options'} {/snippet}

Advanced configuration lives here.
